file_insights.purpose: Unit tests for auth error handler
key_components: Test coverage for all error categories

patterns_discovered: Factory constructors for creating standardized recovery actions
Immutable data classes with clear separation of concerns
Comprehensive error code mapping with fallback handling
User-friendly message generation with actionable recovery steps
Method chaining for error handling pipeline
gotchas_discovered: Large switch statement for error categorization (582 lines in one file)
Potential maintenance overhead when adding new error codes
Extensive error code mapping could become unwieldy over time
Dependency on core exceptions package structure
Large test file requirement due to comprehensive error coverage

approach_outcome.approach: Implemented a comprehensive centralized error handling system with categorization, recovery actions, and user-friendly messages
approach_outcome.outcome: SUCCESS - Successfully implemented a robust auth error handler with 7 error categories and detailed recovery actions
approach_outcome.effectiveness: High - Provides clear separation of concerns between error categorization, recovery actions, and user feedback
approach_outcome.scalability: Moderate - Well-structured but may require refactoring as error codes grow

recommendations: Consider breaking the large switch statement into smaller, more manageable methods by error category
Implement a registry pattern for error handlers to improve extensibility
Add error code versioning to handle deprecated codes gracefully
Consider creating separate classes for each error category to reduce file size
Implement a fallback mechanism for unknown error codes with logging for future improvements
Add metrics tracking for error types to inform improvements
Consider implementing error code aggregation for similar error scenarios
